problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: If Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
